excluded_sources.name: Aksharantar

sources.name: Google Dakshina Bengali

sources.intended_use: candidate conversational source after license confirmation and audit

sources.name: Bangla Transliteration Further Pretraining Dataset
sources.intended_use: candidate only after authenticated download, checksum, and audit
risks: license must be checked on the dataset page
may be unpaired pretraining text rather than supervised word pairs
